generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a concerned citizen, I've been following the recent debates on civil defense preparedness. While I understand the importance of being prepared, I worry that excessive spending on civil defense could divert crucial resources from other national security priorities. We need a balanced approach that ensures our safety without compromising other essential needs. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
